title: Telegram node fails when attribution is disabled
symptom: Disabling the 'Include n8n attribution in responses' setting causes the Telegram node to fail with a 'Bad Request' error. The node works correctly when attribution is enabled.
root_cause: The Telegram node likely defaults to MarkdownV2 for parsing text. When attribution is disabled, the text may contain characters that are not properly escaped, leading to parsing errors.
fix_steps: Set the Parse Mode to HTML
agent_instruction: Change the Parse Mode in the Telegram node settings to HTML and save the workflow.
